item.title: AI Drug Discovery Is Not Just About Speed
item.description: What AI really changes in drug discovery is the way search space is organized — not just speed.

item.title: AlphaFold 3 and the Future of Drug Discovery
item.description: A brief observation from my research: AlphaFold 3's ability to predict protein-ligand interactions i...
